lane.title: 02 Google Ads
lane.last_task: Create and enable Hamza Hotel late-night brand campaign
lane.last_summary: Deployed Hamza Express Ads endpoint and /go/google-night landing; created HE — Hamza Hotel Late Night Brand Capture — v2 campaign 23877692297 at Rs500/day, 5km presence-only radius, 22:00-03:00 schedule, Hamza Hotel/Express keywords, craving-first copy with 10% dine-in; enabled v2 and paused old Brand v1, generic Late Night v1, Dinner v1, with PMax remaining paused. Saved execution record to _context/Google_Ads_Hamza_Brand_2026-05-25/10-live-execution-record.md.
lane.next_action: Monitor next full 22:00-03:00 window: search terms must stay Hamza/Hamza Express intent, compare landing pageview-to-directions/call/menu actions, and ask outlet if late-night customers mention Google/Hamza Express.
lane.mutation_status: LIVE Google Ads money mutation completed: campaign 23877692297 ENABLED at Rs500/day; campaigns 23845870050, 23854158442, 23855561197 PAUSED; 23834053403 remains PAUSED; Cloudflare Pages production updated for Ads endpoint and landing page.

recent_events.task: Define Hamza brand vs competitor conquest targeting structure
recent_events.summary: Recommended separating Hamza Hotel brand capture from competitor conquest. Hamza Hotel/Express searches should run active at 5km because intent is warm and connected to Hamza memory. Competitor terms such as Empire Central Street, Imperial Restaurant, Taj Shivajinagar, New Hilal, and New North Indian should be a separate 2km conquest test, preferably paused or low-budget, using competitor names only as exact/phrase keywords and not in ad copy to avoid trademark/misleading ad risk. Visible ad should remain Hamza Express craving/late-night/offer focused.
recent_events.next_action: If owner approves conquest layer, build separate paused 2km competitor Search campaign/ad groups and keep primary Rs500 Hamza brand test clean first.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Targeting strategy guidance only.

recent_events.task: Shift late-night Hamza ad to craving-first hero
recent_events.summary: Updated the late-night Brand conveyance per Nihaf direction to personalize for late-night customer craving: pinned hero now starts with 'Hamza Ghee Rice & Kabab', second headline 'Try Hamza Express', third headline '10% Dine-In Tonight'. Description carries Wahi Hamza naam / naya zaiqa / open till 3 AM and Hamza Hotel search bridge. Verified all headline and description lengths within Google RSA limits. No live mutation.
recent_events.next_action: If approved, use this craving-first hero stack in landing and live RSA setup, with Hamza Hotel search bridge in description/landing subcopy.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Local docs/mockup only.

recent_events.task: Zoom-out macro objective for Hamza Hotel search ad headline
recent_events.summary: Paused live execution and reframed the campaign objective from copy tweaking to macro consumer psychology: intercept the exact Hamza Hotel search, reduce confusion about Hamza Express being the current HKP Road face, create a low-friction trial impulse, then convert to directions/dine-in using late-night hours and 10% offer. No live mutation.
recent_events.next_action: Finalize the 30-character headline stack around search mirroring + trial impulse + late-night reason before any landing/RSA mutation.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Strategy clarification only.

recent_events.summary: Reframed late-night Brand conveyance from generic curiosity to conversion-oriented trial impulse. Verified Google headline/description character limits. Updated exact config, copy doc, and mockup. No live mutation.

Updated config, copy doc, and mockup to explain Hamza Hotel as remembered name and Hamza Express as current newer HKP Road format.

recent_events.task: Explain Google Ads targeting controls for Hamza Hotel late-night setup
recent_events.summary: Explained location mode, Search partners, Display, bidding, and audiences from scratch for the Hamza Express late-night Hamza Hotel campaign. Recommended presence-only, Google Search only, Display off, manual CPC initially, and audiences as observation only because the keyword/location/schedule combination is the real targeting brain for physical footfall.
recent_events.next_action: Use these settings when applying the live Brand campaign setup after landing proof and ad asset/keyword/schedule mutation path are ready.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Explanation and platform guidance only.

recent_events.task: Exact Google Ads platform configuration for Hamza Hotel late-night campaign
recent_events.summary: Verified live Google Ads account/campaign state and current API surface. Brand campaign 23845870050 is enabled, Rs50/day, 5km presence proximity, 0 delivery; Late Night 23854158442 is enabled, Rs300/day, 7km, spending on generic open-now searches. Created exact configuration doc for active Rs500/day Hamza Hotel late-night 5km Search campaign plus paused 2km biryani/ghee-rice fallback, including location, schedule, keywords, negatives, device, audiences, assets, text conveyance, landing CTA, conversion measurement, and kill criteria. Found current live mutation endpoint can change budget/status/bids/negatives but cannot safely apply Brand keywords/RSA/schedule/assets.
recent_events.next_action: Before live money mutation, update/verify /go/google-night landing message/tracking and either add a purpose-built Google Ads endpoint or apply exact Brand campaign setup in Google Ads UI; do not only raise Brand budget to Rs500 without keyword/RSA/schedule/asset readback.

recent_events.task: Add 12 PM lunch Hamza Hotel copy candidate
recent_events.summary: Added Nihaf's proposed lunch copy as a 12 PM candidate in the GBP-verified text asset doc. Flagged that live GBP currently says 2 PM-3 AM, so Open From 12 PM should only go live after GBP/site/landing hours are changed and verified. Recommended RSA headline split: Lunch At Hamza Hotel? / Come To Hamza Express / Open From 12 PM / Wahi Hamza Naam / Naya Zaiqa Naya Andaaz / Ghee Rice & Kabab / 10% Dine-In Offer / 20% Takeaway Offer / Get Directions. Suggested safer description uses Famous Ghee Rice and Kabab unless owner wants the stronger Bangalore's best claim.
recent_events.next_action: Confirm whether real opening is 12 PM or 2 PM; then update GBP/site/landing hours consistently before creating mockup visuals or live ads.
recent_events.mutation_status: none-copy-doc-only

recent_events.task: Correct Hamza Hotel ad positioning from cold messaging to intent conversion
recent_events.summary: Updated text asset doc with positioning correction: Hamza Hotel searchers are warm/high-intent, not cold. recent_events.task: Verify GBP hours and prepare GBP-aligned Hamza Hotel ad text
recent_events.summary: Live GBP cockpit/API readback shows Hamza Express GBP regular hours already configured as daily 00:00-03:00 plus 14:00-24:00, profile description says Open 2pm to 3am. No GBP hours mutation was needed. Found mismatch remains on hamzaexpress.in homepage/schema, which says 11:00-23:00 / 11AM-11PM, and google-night landing does not visibly say open till 3 AM. Created _context/Google_Ads_Hamza_Brand_2026-05-25/08-gbp-verified-text-assets-for-confirmation.md with GBP-aligned text assets: Afternoon/Late Lunch, Dinner, Late Night; recommends replacing Lunch with Afternoon unless real opening time is earlier than 2 PM.
recent_events.next_action: Get Nihaf confirmation on real opening time and approved wording; then create three ad visual mockups and only after that align site/landing hours before live Ads mutation.
